zh.lifeSummary: 當William Powell Adams於1387年出生時，他的父親John Adams Lord of Llanllywel56歲，母親Lady Millicent Bessylls53歲。他於大約1438年與Mrs. William Adams在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1469年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Powell Adams于1387年出生时，他的父亲John Adams Lord of Llanllywel56岁，母亲Lady Millicent Bessylls53岁。他于大约1438年与Mrs. William Adams在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1469年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Hebrew: The Scripture name, in Hebrew, Adham, signifying 'man;' literally earthy, red earth; Rudolph, however, says the name in Ethiopic means ' to be fair, beautiful.' Hence the nurse-name Addy, little Adam.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Powell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: transferred use of the surname of a well-known New England family, whose members included the poet  Robert Lowell  (  1917–77 ). The surname is a variant of   Lovell .

en.lifeSummary: When William Powell Adams was born in 1387, his father, John Adams Lord of Llanllywel, was 56 and his mother, Lady Millicent Bessylls, was 53. He married Mrs. William Adams about 1438, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1469, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Powell Adams est né en 1387, son père, John Adams Lord of Llanllywel, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Lady Millicent Bessylls, avait 53 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. William Adams environ 1438, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1469, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Powell Adams 1387 geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Adams Lord of Llanllywel 56 und seine Mutter Lady Millicent Bessylls 53. Er hat um 1438 in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs. William Adams geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1469 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Powell Adams è nato il nel 1387, il suo padre, John Adams Lord of Llanllywel, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Lady Millicent Bessylls, aveva 53 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. William Adams circa 1438, nel Burslem, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1469, nel Burslem, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Powell Adamsが1387年に生まれた時，父John Adams Lord of Llanllywelは56歳，母Lady Millicent Bessyllsは53歳であった。約1438年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレムでMrs. William Adamsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1469年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレムで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Powell Adams(이)가 1387년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Adams Lord of Llanllywel(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Millicent Bessylls(은)는 53세였다. 그는 대략 1438년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 Mrs. William Adams(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1469년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Powell Adams nasceu em 1387, seu pai, John Adams Lord of Llanllywel, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Lady Millicent Bessylls, tinha 53 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. William Adams aproximadamente 1438, em Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1469, em Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Powell Adams родился в 1387 г., его отцу по имени John Adams Lord of Llanllywel было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Millicent Bessylls, 53. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. William Adams около 1438 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1469 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Powell Adams nació en 1387, su papá, John Adams Lord of Llanllywel, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Lady Millicent Bessylls, tenía 53 años. Se casó con Mrs. William Adams aproximadamente 1438, en Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1469, en Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años.
